leadText: Fancy Apple (Japanese: とくせんリンゴ Select Apple) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Fancy Apple can be used as an ingredient in cooking , with a base Strength of 90. It can be used to cook the following recipes: Name Recipe Minimum pot size Fancy Apple Curry Fancy Apple ×7 7 " Egg Bomb " Curry Honey ×12 Fancy Apple ×11 Fancy Egg ×8 Soft Potato ×4 35 " Gluttony " Potato Salad Soft Potato ×14 Fancy Egg ×9 Bean Sausage ×7 Fancy Apple ×6 36 Fancy Apple Salad Fancy Apple ×8 8 " Dazzling " Apple Cheese Salad Fancy Apple ×15 Moomoo Milk ×5 Pure Oil ×3 23 " Calm Mind " Fruit Salad Fancy Apple ×21 Honey ×16 Greengrass Corn ×12 49 Fancy Apple Juice Fancy Apple ×8 8 " Ember " Ginger Tea Warming Ginger ×9 Fancy Apple ×7 16 Jigglypuff 's Fruity Flan Honey ×20 Fancy Egg ×15 Fancy Apple ×10 Moomoo Milk ×10 55 " Lovely Kiss " Smoothie Fancy Apple ×11 Moomoo Milk ×9 Honey ×7 Soothing Cacao ×8 35 " Lucky Chant " Apple Pie Fancy Apple ×12 Moomoo Milk ×4 16 Neroli's Restorative Tea Warming Ginger ×11 Fancy Apple ×15 Tasty Mushroom ×9 35 " Stalwart " Vegetable Juice Snoozy Tomato ×9 Fancy Apple ×7 16 " Teatime " Corn Scones Fancy Apple ×20 Warming Ginger ×20 Greengrass Corn ×18 Moomoo Milk ×9 67 " Petal Dance " Chocolate Tart Soothing Cacao ×11 Fancy Apple ×11 22

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others. It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others. It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Hidden recurring item ( Dappled Grove , Axew's Eye ) Possible gift after cooking curry Sw Sh IA Hidden recurring item ( Fields of Honor , Soothing Wetlands , Loop Lagoon ) Sw Sh CT Hidden recurring item ( Old Cemetery , Ballimere Lake ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Pokémon Center Curry Ingredients and Berries Japan November 15, 2019 to October 31, 2021
